title: SPECULATION Q 30 Final as one release
display_title: SPECULATION Q 30 Final as one release
wikitext:
[]: Post by Xard » Fri Aug 26, 2011 12:17 pm oh shit 【緊急速報】バルト9で行われているヱヴァ破TV版上映後のミニイベント(司会:伊吹マヤ、ゲスト:加藤夏希)で、Q+?は一度に上映らしい。 #eva0826

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Aug 26, 2011 12:26 pm Your part in green states "It seems that Q and ? will be screened together". Hrmm. Who's Twitter account is this? Don't believe I'm following them yet.

[]: Post by Xard » Fri Aug 26, 2011 1:04 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Your part in green states "It seems that Q and ? will be screened together".

[]: Post by JoeD80 » Fri Aug 26, 2011 1:26 pm The official Khara twitter only mentions Q: khara_inc wrote: 株式会社カラー：『ヱヴァンゲリヲン新劇場版：Ｑ』 2012年 秋 公開

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Aug 26, 2011 1:50 pm This may or may not shed light onto that tweet -- http://yaraon.blog109.fc2.com/blog-entry-3630.html

[]: Post by Kaname Langley » Fri Aug 26, 2011 1:53 pm Mr. Tines wrote: This may or may not shed light onto that tweet -- http://yaraon.blog109.fc2.com/blog-entry-3630.html

[]: Post by symbv » Fri Aug 26, 2011 1:54 pm Xard wrote: it's possible that I'm just failing at Japan forever right now but >Q+?は一度に上映らしい。 doesn't this mean Q and the final part will be screened at the same time?

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Aug 26, 2011 2:01 pm symbv wrote: Many in 2ch are worried about a second coming of the nightmare of EoE....

[]: Post by JimmyWolk » Fri Aug 26, 2011 2:05 pm symbv wrote: Also the story will move swiftly to a grim direction and it is expected to cause divided opinion.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Aug 26, 2011 2:07 pm symbv wrote: Last note: 2ch also complained quite a bit of 2.22 got cut in the TV version -- anyway...

[]: Post by DemonSpade » Fri Aug 26, 2011 2:10 pm I am hoping for a double feature like EoE was, but at least 3 hours long. It's time to wrap this up, if not, some of us won't live long enough to see Final. http://www.neogaf.com/forum/showpost.php?p=30425762&postcount=2056 Seems like even the people at gainax/Khara think that the story is too dark. the second coming of EoE?

[]: Post by qu4d » Fri Aug 26, 2011 2:10 pm symbv wrote: Also the story will move swiftly to a grim direction and it is expected to cause divided opinion. Many in 2ch are worried about a second coming of the nightmare of EoE....

[]: Post by Xard » Fri Aug 26, 2011 2:12 pm symbv wrote: Anyway, it is from the talk in the mini-event in the theater (Vald9, the same one Xard saw Macross Frontier movie)

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Aug 26, 2011 2:16 pm symbv wrote: Many in 2ch are worried about a second coming of the nightmare of EoE....

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Aug 26, 2011 2:21 pm Linked forum post wrote: Still from the same event, Katô said that some people in-the-know find the plot for those last parts to be "too dark". Guess we shouldn't expect a Disney ending.

[]: Post by symbv » Fri Aug 26, 2011 2:25 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: The version that was shown on Japanese TV was 2.0, not the 2.22 DVD/BD (the extra footage from 2.22 wasn't included). 2.0 TV was instead tweaked with the audio/visuals to have the same quality as 2.22.

[]: Post by JoeD80 » Fri Aug 26, 2011 2:26 pm It seems to me that the reason part 4 was named "?" in the first place was because it would take place after "急" and that Khara was planning to not properly fit it in to that structure.

[]: Post by gatotsu911 » Fri Aug 26, 2011 2:37 pm I'm still a little skeptical, but this would explain why the production is taking so freaking long.

[]: Post by Sephizim » Fri Aug 26, 2011 2:48 pm There’s no way they can wrap up the story in a satisfying way in one movie. Unless it was a long movie, they haven’t built the plot up enough to wrap it up in just two hours. Of course, now that I’ve said that, watch as they do just that…

[]: Post by KnightmareX13 » Fri Aug 26, 2011 2:53 pm I wonder how this will effect the release price?
